# Modern Edge Technology

> Senior-engineer-led managed IT, cybersecurity, cloud, network, and E-Rate services for businesses, schools, and libraries across Milwaukee and Wisconsin. Low markup, lean expert team, no fleet overhead.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Managed IT, cybersecurity, cloud, and network services for Wisconsin.
- [About](/about): Founded by Mark Duerwachter — senior-engineer-led Wisconsin IT firm.
- [Contact](/contact): Talk to a senior engineer for a free, no-pressure assessment.
- [Quote](/quote): Request a custom quote for IT, cybersecurity, cloud, or network projects.
- [E-Rate Program](/e-rate): Expert guidance on E-Rate funding for WI schools and libraries.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Real-world Wisconsin IT, E-Rate, and network project results.
- [Blog — The Edge Report](/blog): IT, cybersecurity, cloud, VoIP, and E-Rate insights.

## Services

- [Access Control & Cameras](/services/access-control): Enterprise access control and IP surveillance.
- [Hardware & Software](/services/hardware-software): Procurement, deployment, and lifecycle management.
- [Voice Services](/services/voice-services): Cloud VoIP, SIP trunking, and unified communications.
- [IT Audits](/services/it-audits): Independent IT, security, and network audits.
- [Cloud Migrations](/services/cloud-migrations): AWS, Azure, GCP, and Microsoft 365 migrations.
- [Wireless Networks](/services/wireless-networks): WiFi 6/6E design and structured cabling.
- [Business Continuity & DR](/services/business-continuity): Backup, disaster recovery, and continuity.
- [E-Rate Vendor Services](/services/e-rate): E-Rate-eligible vendor and project services.

## Industries

- [Education (K-12)](/industries/education): IT and E-Rate for Wisconsin schools.
- [Libraries](/industries/libraries): IT, Wi-Fi, and E-Rate Category 2 for public libraries.
- [Healthcare](/industries/healthcare): HIPAA-aligned IT and clinical networks.
- [Manufacturing](/industries/manufacturing): OT/IT segmentation and plant-floor networks.
- [Retail](/industries/retail): POS, guest Wi-Fi, and PCI-aligned security.
- [Hospitality](/industries/hospitality): Guest Wi-Fi, PMS/POS networks, and IPTV.
- [Corporate](/industries/corporate): Hybrid-work IT for Wisconsin corporate offices.
- [Government](/industries/government): Secure, CJIS-aligned IT for municipalities.
- [Non-Profit](/industries/non-profit): Affordable managed IT and cybersecurity for nonprofits.
- [Legal](/industries/legal): Confidentiality-focused IT for Wisconsin law firms.
- [Financial Services](/industries/financial-services): Compliance-aware IT for WI financial firms.
- [Real Estate](/industries/real-estate): Multi-office IT, VoIP, and secure documents.
- [Custom Solutions](/industries/custom): Custom IT for non-standard environments.
